creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks the 0.7.1 you see is a draft release. 
https://github.com/dehydrated-io/dehydrated/commit/3a7795589b546bd4981270986f91613a107bc346

I'll update the FreeBSD port as soon as after the official 0.7.1 release. You might as well request the author to make a release that includes fixes for ECDSA keys.
